response.justification: Strong generalist engineer with 15+ years of experience, recent staff-level role at Stripe, and exposure to MCP/agentic workflows. However, the resume shows limited demonstrated depth in core GenAI requirements: no explicit RAG, vector database, or multi-agent framework experience, and no clear track record of shipping production AI systems for 8+ years. Customer-facing technical discovery experience is also not evident. Worth a screening call to probe GenAI depth.
strengths: Staff-level engineer at Stripe with recent MCP and agentic workflow exposure
Strong polyglot background (TypeScript, Node.js, Python-adjacent) with cloud and data pipeline experience
Proven teaching/mentoring through workshops, talks, and course creation
concerns: No explicit RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience listed
Lacks 8+ years specifically building production AI solutions — GenAI exposure appears recent
Limited evidence of customer-facing forward-deployed or technical discovery work with enterprise stakeholders

key_factors.factor: Staff-level seniority with MCP/agent exposure at Stripe
No evidence of enterprise customer-facing delivery
